title: WHOIS Lookup
description: Inspect registration details, lifecycle dates, name servers, and raw WHOIS text for a domain or IP.

notes.title: How it works
notes.description: This tool uses system WHOIS output so it is useful for registrar checks, expiration triage, and name server audits.

empty.title: Enter a domain or IP to get started
empty.description: The right side will summarize the key registration fields and keep the complete WHOIS text available.

errors.title: Lookup failed
errors.requestFailed: WHOIS lookup failed. Please try again.
